expectations.text: Mentioned files (spectrum.sh, SKILL.md) are read FULLY before spawning agents (Rule: Read files first)
expectations.evidence: Workflow Steps: 'Read mentioned files first (Step 0): Read scripts/spectrum.sh and skills/prism-spectrum/SKILL.md fully before analysis.'

expectations.text: Document describes the signal protocol (spectrum-continue, spectrum-retry, spectrum-blocked, spectrum-error, promise COMPLETE)
expectations.evidence: Section 5 'Signal Protocol' has a full table listing all 5 signals with their meanings and spectrum.sh actions.
Section 6 'stories.json Schema' describes the full structure including epic and stories arrays with status fields.
'Fresh Context Pattern' section: 'Each iteration spawns a completely fresh Claude session via claude --print. No context carries between sessions.'

expectations.text: No recommendations for how to improve the workflow appear
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists. Architecture Notes section states facts without suggestions. No improvement recommendations found.

expectations.text: All agents complete before synthesis (Rule: Wait for completion)
expectations.evidence: Workflow steps show sequential analysis: locate, then analyze, then find patterns, then save. No premature synthesis before agent steps complete.
